title: InspectUrlIndexRequest
description: Request body for the URL Inspection API.

inspectionUrl.description: The fully qualified URL to inspect. Must be under the specified site property.

siteUrl.description: The URL of the site property in Search Console. Can be a URL-prefix property (e.g., https://example.com/) or a domain property (e.g., sc-domain:example.com).

languageCode.description: Optional BCP-47 language code for the response. If not specified, the response will be in English.
